ingredients_text: 56% Meringue (Sugar, Free Range Egg White, Dried Free Range Egg White, Stabiliser (Xanthan Gum), Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid)), 29% Whipped Cream (Milk), 11% Strawberry Sauce (63% Strawberries, Sugar, Maize Flour, Gelling Agent (Pectins), Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid)), 4% White Chocolate (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Milk Powder, Emulsifier( Soya Lecithins)).
